post.message: LLM judge reported the PR title claims a fix that the changed non-test code does not plausibly exercise. Deterministic checks did not fire, but the judge's reading of intent vs. diff disagrees. Severity raised because the PR claims a fix ("Closes #344").
post.judgeRationale: judge refuted the block: The changes consist entirely of translations and formatting updates in documentation files, which directly affect the content displayed to users in the respective languages.
